title: Sign Up Now for Snowplowing and Sanding
summary: It’s not too early to sign up for snowplowing and sanding services. It’s the season for Elderly and disabled Tribal Members living in the Tribe’s service area to contact our Housing department to get on the sanding and snowplowing list for winter. Please call 335-7228 for details on how the program...

title: Transportation program keeps rolling
summary: New Transportation department passenger vans parked in front of Tyotkas Elder Center. The Tribe’s Transportation program continues to evolve to meet changing needs. “It’s an ever-changing machine,” said Brandi Bell, the Tribe’s Transportation Coordinator. “We don’t do as much of some things right now, but other areas are exploding.” For example...
